title: Prosperity Club — Financial education for ordinary people
description: Deborah Armstrong on insurance, investing, social class, and the strategies the wealthy use to keep more of what they earn. Free articles + a 5-week Investing Masterclass.

footer.colophon: © 2026 Prosperity Club, Deborah Armstrong. Content for educational purposes only. Not financial, legal, or investment advice.

sections.title: Welcome to Prosperity Club
sections.lede: Helping People Achieve Their Prosperity Goals. How to make enough money to pay your bills.

sections.text: Prosperity Club is a dependable source for financial education. Free articles, a member Masterclass, and one-to-one Risk Management — written for working and middle-class readers in the US and Canada.

items.value: What social class do I belong to?
items.hint: Learning about social class allows you to better understand where you stand, so that you can take the right steps towards prosperity. From income to education levels to job opportunities, social class can significantly impact your day-to-day life.

items.value: Why insurance is essential for financial well-being.
items.hint: Insurance for your home, car, and other valuables protects what you own. Track expenses, store documents safely, and consider working with a financial advisor to plan for retirement.
Investing can seem complex and intimidating, but understanding the basics can set you on a path to smarter financial decisions. Learn about types of investments, your goals, and diversification.

A licensed insurance agent who sells life, health, and property/casualty products. Prosperity Club was established by a passionate woman who found her way through a bleak financial situation by educating herself in finance.

sections.text: Prosperity Club accesses experts in different fields to help you understand the roadblocks that keep you from succeeding and what you can do about it. The great thing about online education is that we help you get the financial education you need through our own educational resources or that of others we find beneficial.

For people moving up the socio-economic ladder, you will have the opportunity to learn how to manage income, invest safely, and find the educational help you need. Prosperity Club works as a repository of financial knowledge and education where you can learn how to better manage your money.

Prosperity Club helps uncover the why of expenses and identifies what actions you can take to reduce them without changing your lifestyle. Budgets do not resolve financial spending or obligation — attaching dollar amounts to each expense is not how to reduce expenses. Tracking expenses uncovers the underlying reasons why you are spending on certain things.

sections.body: The rich don't avoid taxes by cheating. They avoid taxes by understanding the rules better than everyone else. The rules are public. The tax code is published.

sections.text: Five weeks. Member-only ($5/month). Covers strategy, structure, and keeping what you build — not how to pick stocks. For readers who want to think about money the way people with money think about it.

items.hint: Why insurance is the foundation; how to size term life + disability.

items.value: The tax code is the strategy
items.hint: Roth IRA + HSA stacking; 1031 exchange basics; what Buy, Borrow, Die actually means.
Which accounts hold what, and why most retail advice gets this backwards.
Index funds vs. picks; rebalancing rules; what NOT to trade.
Estate planning baseline; beneficiary hygiene; the documents everyone should already have.

sections.title: Join free, upgrade when you're ready.
sections.lede: The blog is fully free. The Masterclass and the Risk Management consultation are for members. Cancel any time.
